steps.name: I open the CRM application (Companies)
I navigate to the Companies page
I click create company
I fill the company form with generated company data
I save the company
the company should be created
I open the CRM application (Companies)
I navigate to the Companies page
I search and open the created company
the company should be opened successfully
I open the CRM application (Companies)
I navigate to the Companies page
I search and open the created company
I click the edit icon
I update the company details with generated updated data
the company should be updated successfully
I open the CRM application (Companies)
I navigate to the Companies page
I search and open the created company
I click the delete icon
the company should be deleted successfully
